evalAfter: (async () => { const r={}; const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||'')); if(btn)btn.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,3000)); r.version=(await fetch('version.json?b='+Date.now()).then(x=>x.json()).catch(()=>({}))).version; try{MOS.nav('catalogo');}catch(e){} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,4500)); r.botonMoneyExiste=!!document.querySelector('.cat-btn-money'); MOS.abrirModalPrecioCurvas('IDPRO0000063'); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,2500)); r.toggles=document.querySelectorAll('#pcSatelites .pc-sat-tg').length; r.membreteToggle=!!document.getElementById('pcMembretesSw'); r.ayuda=!document.getElementById('pcAyudaSat')?.classList.contains('hidden'); const tg=document.querySelector('.pc-sat-tg'); if(tg){MOS._pcSatToggle(tg.dataset.sat);} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,300)); r.toggleApagado=!document.querySelector('.pc-sat-tg')?.classList.contains('on'); r.btnLbl=(document.getElementById('pcGuardarLbl')||{}).textContent; return r; })()
